text:
There once was a wise old tortoise named Tortoise. He was famous throughout the land for his slow pace — he never hurried, but always took his time.

On a bright sunny afternoon, Tortoise decided to go on an adventure to the enchanted forest. As he leisurely strolled, he came upon a clearing filled with the most beautiful flowers he had ever seen. They shimmered with magic, and each flower emitted a gentle hum.

Curiosity getting the better of him, Tortoise plucked one flower. Immediately, he felt a warm glow, and his heart buzzed with feelings he could not describe. He returned the flower.

Suddenly, a fairy swooped down. "You've been lucky," she chirped. "These flowers grant courage once a year. Keep this one."

With that, she fluttered away into the forest. Tortoise felt invincible.

That evening, he returned to the clearing. His pace was unhurried as he danced among the flowers. Every
